rationale: Bug hunt on C10 (rune activation row) found race condition: choice buttons stayed enabled during ogham dispatch await, allowing player to trigger both ogham and choice simultaneously. Fixed with button disable/re-enable pattern. Feature: WalkHUD v2 — added 5 faction reputation mini-badges with color-coded bars (druides=green, anciens=amber, korrigans=purple, niamh=blue, ankou=red), turn counter showing cards played vs MOS target, PV bar damage/heal flash animation, responsive font sizing via MerlinVisual. Forest3D _update_hud now reads full MerlinStore state for factions, active ogham, and turn count.
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt on C11 code (walk_hud faction display + forest3d hud wiring). Then: end run screen with faction ending choice — when rep>=80 on 1+ factions, show narrative ending selection screen.
